name: Anderson Park
description: Anderson Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hudson, WI. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Baldwin Pickleball/Tennis Courts At Mill Pond Park
description: Newly resurfaced courts. Two courts have permanent Nets and two have portable nuts that stay on site. Right next to a play park and hockey rink.
open_play_schedule: Look up Baldwin Area Pickleball Association for play schedule.

name: Glover Park
description: Glover Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hudson, WI. There are 2 outdoor courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts can be reserved. The courts are free.

name: Hudson YMCA
description: Hudson YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Hudson, WI. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Reservations are available. The facility includes amenities like locker rooms, restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons.

name: New Richmond Area Centre
description: Come play pickleball at New Richmond Area Centre in New Richmond, WI! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms, water, and locker rooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — One-time fee OR membership required

name: New Richmond Mary Park
description: Come play pickleball at New Richmond Mary Park in New Richmond, WI! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free.

name: New Richmond Starr Elementary School
description: New Richmond Starr Elementary School is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in New Richmond, WI. There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.
open_play_schedule: School courts, so not available if being used for gym class or other school activity. 4 pickleball courts lined on two of the tennis courts.

name: St. Croix Valley Indoor Tennis Club
description: St. Croix Valley Indoor Tennis Club is a place to play pickleball in Hudson, WI. There are 4 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include locker rooms and restrooms.

name: YMCA Camp St. Croix
description: YMCA Camp St. Croix is a place to play pickleball in Hudson, WI. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play.
fees: Members only — N/A per day $75 Annual.
